name: totally-integrated-claude
description: Siemens TIA Portal engineering automation for Claude Code. Provides routed skills for Python TIA Scripting and C# Openness API (project lifecycle, PLC, HMI, devices, networks, drives, import/export, Add-Ins), plus MCP server for TIA Portal V21.

plugins.name: totally-integrated-claude
plugins.description: Plugin for working with TIA Portal and TIA Openness API
